title: ArrowPack Create
description: A complete server and client package for your Create needs.
body:
## Create ecosystem in one place
With this modpack, you can enjoy the Create 6.0.x ecosystem on a modernized 1.20.1 Fabric server with all ammenities you need.

This includes all major Create packages available for 1.20.1, notably:
1. **Create Fabric** - base Create mod
2. **Create Crafts & Additions** - electricity, beekeeping and more fabrication processes
3. **Create: Steam 'n' Rails** - expand the Create railway and logistics system

any many more smaller Create mods.

Future version may incorporate more Create mods as they become available for 1.20.1.
Such changes would be communicated in the changelog with a notice regarding world-gen incompatibility or side-effects.

## Optimization mods
**Indium**, **Lithium** and **Sodium** come pre-installed for optimal rendering performance.

## Quality of life mods
Some mods which I consider essential such as:
1. **Roughly Enough Items** - ingame recipe menu
2. **Tree Harvester** - chop trees in one go
3. **Jade** - HUD info for the looked at entity
4. **Xaero's Minimap** and **Xaero's World Map**
5. **Zoomify** - zoom mod with smooth transitions
6. **ClickThrough** - don't let signs or item frames block you from reaching for that chest
7. **Waystones** - teleport across large distances by beacons
8. **Chunk Loaders** - Allow players to keep certain chunks loaded while exploring the world
9. **Gravestones** - Items are stored inside a gravestone upon death
10. **Inventory Management**: Essential inventory sorting and transfer between containers

## Datapacks
**Tectonic** adds more visually interesting and extreme mountain ranges, underground rivers and more to your world.
**Dungeons and Taverns** adds - well - taverns and dungeons in the form of Pillager outposts and friendly innkeepers as encounters on your adventure.

## Variation and fun
I love flying around and exploring the world, so **Immersive Aircraft**, **Man of Many Planes** and **Traveler's Backpack** got you covered.
To add more variations on blocks (stairs, slab etc.), you have **Chipped**.
With **Farmer's Delight** and **Create: Garnished**, you can extend the already rich farming and cooking aspects of Minecraft.

## Client-side included
For easier distribution among friends, this modpack comes with the following mods installed:
1. **Iris Shaders**
2. **Complementary Shaders - Reimagined**
3. **LambDynamicLights**
4. **Falling Leaves**


So all your friends instantly can enjoy a vivid Minecraft world with one click.

## Summary
Most if not all of Create with sensible optimizations, modern shaders and variety datapacks included.

If you want a one-click solution to quickly setup a server for **Create**, this modpack is for you.
